reviews.comment:
Muy buenos empleados, atentos y serviciales, solo falta presencia de un responsable en horas no pico, tipo 21 hrs o 06 de la mañana, que pueda tomar decisiones.

(Translated by Google)
Very good employees, attentive and helpful. The only thing missing is a manager during off-peak hours, such as 9 p.m. or 6 a.m., who can make decisions.

reviews.comment:
Excelente atención,  entorno natural con el rio al lado y conocimiento del camino por parte de los que atienden los surtidores. _Agradezco  que asesorado convenientemente pude tomar la ruta correcta.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service, a beautiful natural setting with the river nearby, and the staff at the gas stations were very knowledgeable about the route. I appreciate that I was able to take the correct route thanks to their helpful advice.
